name: hud_ui_composite_panel_resize_vector_relayout
description: HudUiCompositePanel::ResizeEntryVectorAndRelayout grows or shrinks the entry vector to a requested count, updates visible/active entry state, and relayouts entries at the panel position.
known_limits: Depends on composite-panel vector insertion, ResizeEntryCount/ReapplyEntryCount, LayoutEntries, and panel/text-label helpers, which are functionally accepted but remain composite-panel class binary-safe debt.

VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob1 /GX /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?ResizeEntryVectorAndRelayout@HudUiCompositePanel@@QAEXH@Z at 0x4bbca0 still fails: 442 unmasked mismatches, 36 relocation bytes masked, 11 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, Binary Ninja body is 486 bytes and the VC object symbol is 224 bytes. The drift reflects helper factoring and composite-panel class/source-shape scheduling.
binary_safe_evidence: Binary Ninja shows current vector count computation, template transition-text-panel construction for size changes, grow through HudUiCompositePanelVector::InsertCopies, shrink through entry scalar destructor slot 0, template destruction, ResizeEntryCount or ReapplyEntryCount, then final LayoutEntries at current GetX/GetY.
The native composite-panel resize-vector smoke validates grow, shrink destructor dispatch, no-size-change reapply, active-count updates, hidden/cleared entries, and final layout coordinates.
